translation: self.assertFalse("IP with characters should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("124.14.32.abc"))
self.assertFalse("IP with leading zeroes should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("124.14.32.01"))
self.assertFalse("IP with three groups should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("23.64.12"))
self.assertFalse("IP with five groups should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("26.34.23.77.234"))
self.assertFalse("IP empty string should be invalid", self.__validator.isValidInet6Address("")) # empty string
self.assertTrue("localhost IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("127.0.0.1"))
self.assertTrue("class A IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("24.25.231.12"))
self.assertFalse("illegal class A IP should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("2.41.32.324"))
self.assertTrue("class B IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("135.14.44.12"))
self.assertFalse("illegal class B IP should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("154.123.441.123"))
self.assertTrue("class C IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("213.25.224.32"))
self.assertFalse("illegal class C IP should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("201.543.23.11"))
self.assertTrue("class D IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("229.35.159.6"))
self.assertFalse("illegal class D IP should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("231.54.11.987"))
self.assertTrue("class E IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("248.85.24.92"))
self.assertFalse("illegal class E IP should be invalid", self.__validator.isValid("250.21.323.48"))
self.assertTrue("fsf.org IP should be valid", self.__validator.isValid("199.232.41.5"))
